title: Creamy Roasted Levrek
description: A pescatarian-friendly fermented and chewy Turkish dish featuring heavy cream in a creamy roasted fish preparation.
instructions: Prepare the Levrek by rinsing it thoroughly and ensuring it is clean.
Cut each fish into chunks, about 1 inch in size. Season with salt and pepper on both sides.
In a large skillet or shallow baking dish, mix heavy cream, minced garlic, chopped onion, olive oil, and seasoned Levrek together.
Place the skillet in the preheated oven and roast for approximately 25 minutes until the fish is cooked through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
